# cmccloudv2_mongo_database (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cmccloudv2_mongo_database" "mongodb" {
    instance_id = "4233c081-0f75-4d9a-83f0-3641a0da1a62"
    name        = "mongodb"
    collections = ["coll1", "coll2"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `collections` (Set of String) Set of collections that you want to create on this mongo database
- `instance_id` (String) Mongo instance id
- `name` (String) Mongo database name

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `update` (String)
